free_text: The targets were made by evaporating natural lithium
metal onto self-supporting carbon films of thickness
about 20 ug/cm2. The target thickness was
estimated by measuring the Coulomb scattering of
protons in a forward direction at 2.0 MeV; the
thickness used in the experiments was about 40 ug/cm2
Two semiconductor detectors of the diffused
Third detector was used as a monitor.
